name: the grouping records the highest severity level seen for each rule across its findings
command: printf '%s' '{"version":"2.1.0","runs":[{"tool":{"driver":{"name":"vale"}},"results":[{"ruleId":"Spelling","level":"note","message":{"text":"a"}},{"ruleId":"Spelling","level":"error","message":{"text":"b"}}]}]}' > a.sarif && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/group-findings-by-rule.sh" --dir . 2>e.txt; grep -q 'rule=vale/Spelling tools=vale count=2 level=error' e.txt && echo records-max-level 1>&2
